# Łukasz Miądowicz — AI Product Leader & AI Strategy Lead

> I help companies grow revenue, cut costs, and move faster — I build AI products — and I use AI to build them faster. I find the niche, build the system, and ship the product.

## Who I Am

Łukasz Miądowicz is an AI Product Leader, AI Strategy & Adoption Lead, and hands-on Builder based in Warsaw, Poland (available remote worldwide). I started as a Software Engineer — including at Google for Startups — moved into product, and never stopped coding. I find differentiators others miss, identify the niche, build the business case, and ship.

**Documented results:**
- $80M ARR scaled (B2B SaaS)
- 98% task time reduction (Qtravel.ai — proposal creation from 4 hours to 5 minutes)
- $191 net savings per task · 1.3-year payback period (Qtravel.ai)
- 3× capacity increase (Qtravel.ai, same headcount)
- +80% conversion increase (Qtravel.ai — AI personalisation layer)
- +40% conversion increase (ButterCMS AI Alpha, shipped in under 3 months)
- PhD Quantum Physics (doctoral-level research)
- Haas School of Business alumnus (UC Berkeley)

## What I Do

- **AI Product Leader** — End-to-end AI product leadership: vision, roadmap, team, stakeholder alignment. Hands-on enough to prototype the hardest hypotheses myself.
- **Niche & Differentiator Discovery** — First-principles user research, JTBD, and rapid hypothesis testing. I find the niche others miss.
- **Revenue & Cost Impact via AI** — I build the economic case for AI investments and then deliver it. $191 net savings per task, 1.3-year payback documented.
- **AI Adoption & Strategy** — Move from AI experiments to AI operating models. Frameworks, workshops, and hands-on coaching.
- **Rapid Prototyping (I Build It)** — From hypothesis to functional prototype in 24–48 hours using Claude Code, Python, and LLM APIs.
- **Forward-Deployed Solutions** — Embed with customers to deploy and customize AI systems in their environment.
- **AI System Architecture** — End-to-end design of multi-agent AI systems with HITL, MCP, and observability.
- **Agentic UX Design** — In-product experiences where AI agents operate inside existing workflows, not as chatbot overlays.
- **Enterprise AI Readiness** — SSO, RBAC, audit logs, multi-tenancy, LLMOps, evals.

## Blog & Writing

- [All articles — AI product strategy, agentic AI, product discovery](https://miadowicz.com/blog)
- [The Feature Moat Is Dead: Building Durable Products in the AI Era](https://miadowicz.com/blog/the-feature-moat-is-dead-building-durable-products-in-the-ai-era) — 24-min first-principles guide to competitive advantage in 2026: Product Moat Stack, Moat Durability Matrix, Distribution Flywheel, Context Graph, Decision Traces. Tactical playbook for PMs.
- [The Age of Amplification: What I See Coming in AI by 2030](https://miadowicz.com/blog/the-age-of-amplification-ai-predictions-2030-first-principles) — First-principles analysis of AI's trajectory to 2030: exponential acceleration, self-improving systems, multi-agent coordination, AEO vs SEO, and the Age of Amplification framework.
- [Agentic UX: Designing In-Product Experiences for AI Agents](https://miadowicz.com/blog/agentic-ux-designing-in-product-experiences-for-ai-agents) — 4 design patterns (Embedded Agent, Work Queue, Project Participant, Management Interface), supervision layer, A2UI, and 7 PM practices. Case studies: Notion, Salesforce, Intercom, Cursor 3.
- [The Agentic AI Product Playbook: Building 0-to-1 Products from First Principles](https://miadowicz.com/blog/the-agentic-ai-playbook-building-0-to-1-products-from-first-principles) — 30-min deep dive: 4D framework, multi-agent architecture, circuit breakers, unit economics. 98% task time reduction, $191/task ROI, 1.3-year payback documented.
- [When Should You Use AI? A Decision Framework for AI PMs](https://miadowicz.com/blog/when-should-you-use-ai-decision-framework-for-pms) — 5-question framework for deciding when AI belongs in a product feature: decision tree, 5 anti-patterns, real-world examples.
- [What Is an Agent Harness — and Why 90% of AI Builders Miss It](https://miadowicz.com/blog/what-is-agent-harness)
- [AI Product Discovery: How to Test Hypotheses in Days, Not Sprints](https://miadowicz.com/blog/ai-product-discovery-framework)
- [Beyond User Stories: Why Agent Specs Are the Future of Software Development](https://miadowicz.com/blog/beyond-user-stories-why-agent-specs-are-the-future-software-development) — How Agent Specs replace vague user stories for AI coding agents, reduce the Translation Tax, and help developers become Agent Orchestrators.
- [From PM to Venture Builder: The Definitive Guide to the Career Move Nobody Talks About (But Should)](https://miadowicz.com/blog/from-pm-to-venture-builder-the-definitive-guide-to-the-career-move-nobody-talks-about) — Comprehensive guide to moving from Product Manager to Venture Builder: skills map, 3-phase venture lifecycle with go/no-go gates, metrics framework, governance, AI moats, and talent playbook.
- [AI Product Glossary — Feature Moat, Product Moat Stack, Distribution Flywheel, Context Graph, Decision Traces, Agent Harness, HITL, RAG, MCP, Agent Spec, Circuit Breaker, Venture Builder and more](https://miadowicz.com/glossary)
